findings.message: Title is missing.
findings.fix: Add the official public title.

findings.message: Artist or creator name is missing.
findings.fix: Add the official artist or creator name.

findings.message: Release date is missing.
findings.fix: Add release date metadata.

findings.message: Genre is missing.
findings.fix: Add genre metadata.

findings.message: Language is missing.
findings.fix: Add language metadata.

findings.message: Description is missing.
findings.fix: Add description metadata.

findings.message: Explicit-content status is missing.
findings.fix: Add explicit true/false status.

findings.message: No primary audio or video file was found.
findings.fix: Add or identify the final master or primary media file.

findings.message: No artwork image was found.
findings.fix: Add release artwork before public distribution or catalog publication.

findings.message: No lyric or timed-text file was found.
findings.fix: Add lyrics or timed lyrics if the release uses vocals.

findings.message: No stems were found.
findings.fix: Add stems or plan stem separation for remix, sync, licensing, or Suede optimization.

findings.message: Master splits add to 80, not 100.
findings.fix: Correct master split percentages.

findings.message: Publishing splits add to 110, not 100.
findings.fix: Correct publishing split percentages.

findings.message: One or more contributors lack confirmation.
findings.fix: Collect contributor confirmations before royalty routing or licensing.

findings.message: Ownership claim is missing or unconfirmed.
findings.fix: Confirm master and publishing ownership.

findings.message: Samples, covers, interpolations, or third-party material are indicated but clearance is not confirmed.
findings.fix: Provide clearance details or remove uncleared material before licensing.

findings.message: Prior release, registration, minting, or licensing history is unknown.
findings.fix: Confirm whether the work has already been distributed, registered, minted, licensed, or sold.

findings.message: No creator wallet or payment destination was provided.
findings.fix: Add a public wallet or payment-routing note if Suede royalty routing or agent commerce is intended.

findings.message: No provenance or creation-history notes were provided.
findings.fix: Add creation history, source notes, or chain-of-custody details.

findings.message: Project can be prepared with a Suede Rights Passport after blockers are resolved.
findings.fix: Use suede-rights-passport once error findings are fixed or clearly documented.

recommended_next_action: Fix error findings before preparing a Suede Rights Passport, registering rights, licensing, or routing royalties.
